## Types

- [GitleaksBaseline](#gitleaksbaseline) - Represents a Gitleaks-compatible baseline report used to suppress existing findings.
- [GitleaksConfigLoader](#gitleaksconfigloader) - Loads Gitleaks-compatible rule configuration.
- [GitleaksConfigWriter](#gitleaksconfigwriter) - Writes resolved Gitleaks-compatible rule sets as deterministic TOML.
- [GitleaksIgnore](#gitleaksignore) - Represents Gitleaks-compatible fingerprint ignore entries.
- [PicketConfigLoader](#picketconfigloader) - Loads Picket-native rule configuration while preserving the Gitleaks-compatible rule schema.

## GitleaksBaseline

`Picket.Compat.GitleaksBaseline`

Represents a Gitleaks-compatible baseline report used to suppress existing findings.

### Constructors

- `GitleaksBaseline(IReadOnlyList<Finding> findings)` - Represents a Gitleaks-compatible baseline report used to suppress existing findings.

### Methods

- `Filter(IReadOnlyList<Finding> findings, int redactionPercent)` - Returns findings not already present in this baseline.
- `IsNew(Finding finding, int redactionPercent)` - Returns a value indicating whether a finding is new relative to this baseline.
- `Load(string path)` - Loads a Gitleaks JSON report from disk as a baseline.

### Properties

- `Count` - Gets the number of findings in the baseline.
- `Empty` - Gets an empty baseline.

## GitleaksConfigLoader

`Picket.Compat.GitleaksConfigLoader`

Loads Gitleaks-compatible rule configuration.

### Methods

- `FromToml(string toml, string sourceName)` - Loads rules from Gitleaks TOML content.
- `LoadDefaultRuleSet()` - Loads the embedded Gitleaks-compatible default rule set without reading environment variables or target-local configuration files.
- `LoadFile(string path)` - Loads rules from a Gitleaks TOML file.
- `LoadRuleSet(string configPath, string source)` - Loads rules using Gitleaks-compatible config precedence.

## GitleaksConfigWriter

`Picket.Compat.GitleaksConfigWriter`

Writes resolved Gitleaks-compatible rule sets as deterministic TOML.

### Methods

- `Write(RuleSet ruleSet)` - Writes a resolved rule set as deterministic TOML.

## GitleaksIgnore

`Picket.Compat.GitleaksIgnore`

Represents Gitleaks-compatible fingerprint ignore entries.

### Constructors

- `GitleaksIgnore(IEnumerable<string> fingerprints)` - Represents Gitleaks-compatible fingerprint ignore entries.

### Methods

- `Filter(IReadOnlyList<Finding> findings)` - Returns findings not suppressed by this ignore set.
- `FromLines(IEnumerable<string> lines)` - Parses ignore entries from lines using Gitleaks-compatible rules.
- `IsIgnored(Finding finding)` - Returns a value indicating whether a finding is suppressed.
- `Load(string path)` - Loads ignore entries from a .gitleaksignore file.
- `LoadExisting(IEnumerable<string> paths)` - Loads ignore entries from every existing file path in order.

### Properties

- `Count` - Gets the number of loaded fingerprint entries.
- `Empty` - Gets an empty ignore set.

## PicketConfigLoader

`Picket.Compat.PicketConfigLoader`

Loads Picket-native rule configuration while preserving the Gitleaks-compatible rule schema.

### Methods

- `LoadDefaultRuleSet()` - Loads the embedded Picket-native default rule set without reading environment variables or target-local configuration files.
- `LoadRuleSet(string configPath, string source)` - Loads rules using Picket-native config precedence.
